mica_queue_stats_t Struct Reference
[MiCA Queue API (gxio/mica_queue.h)]

Record for receiving mica_queue stats. More...


Data Fields

uint64_t total_requests
 Total number of requests submitted since the queue was created or the last clear_counters command.
uint64_t total_sync_ops
 Total number of gxio_mica_queue_sync_op calls since the queue was created or the last clear_counters command.
uint64_t total_req_fifo_enqueues
 Total number of queue_ops that couldn't immediately be assigned a HW context and so had to be added to the req_fifo.
uint64_t total_dones
 Total number of MiCA ops that were completed since the queue was created or the last clear_counters command.
uint32_t req_fifo_overflows
 Total number of queue_ops that couldn't be added to the req fifo because it was full.
uint32_t result_fifo_overflows
 Total number of MiCA ops that were completed, but whose results where discarded because the result fifo was full.
uint32_t num_contexts
 The number of MiCA HW contexts owned by this queue.
uint32_t cur_contexts_busy
 The number of MiCA HW contexts that are currently busy.
uint32_t max_contexts_busy
 The peak number of MiCA HW contexts that were simultaneously busy since the queue was created or the last clear_counters command.
uint32_t cur_req_fifo_cnt
 The current number of entries in the request fifo.
uint32_t max_req_fifo_cnt
 The peak value of cur_req_fifo_cnt since the queue was created or the last clear_counters command.
uint32_t cur_result_fifo_cnt [MAX_RESULT_FIFO_CNT]
 The current number of entries in the result fifo(s).
uint32_t max_result_fifo_cnt [MAX_RESULT_FIFO_CNT]
 The peak value of cur_result_fifo_cnt since the queue was created or the last clear_counters command.

Detailed Description

Record for receiving mica_queue stats.

Field Documentation

uint64_t mica_queue_stats_t::total_requests

Total number of requests submitted since the queue was created or the last clear_counters command.

uint64_t mica_queue_stats_t::total_sync_ops

Total number of gxio_mica_queue_sync_op calls since the queue was created or the last clear_counters command.

uint64_t mica_queue_stats_t::total_req_fifo_enqueues

Total number of queue_ops that couldn't immediately be assigned a HW context and so had to be added to the req_fifo.

uint64_t mica_queue_stats_t::total_dones

Total number of MiCA ops that were completed since the queue was created or the last clear_counters command.

uint32_t mica_queue_stats_t::req_fifo_overflows

Total number of queue_ops that couldn't be added to the req fifo because it was full.

uint32_t mica_queue_stats_t::result_fifo_overflows

Total number of MiCA ops that were completed, but whose results where discarded because the result fifo was full.

uint32_t mica_queue_stats_t::num_contexts

The number of MiCA HW contexts owned by this queue.

uint32_t mica_queue_stats_t::cur_contexts_busy

The number of MiCA HW contexts that are currently busy.

uint32_t mica_queue_stats_t::max_contexts_busy

The peak number of MiCA HW contexts that were simultaneously busy since the queue was created or the last clear_counters command.

uint32_t mica_queue_stats_t::cur_req_fifo_cnt

The current number of entries in the request fifo.

uint32_t mica_queue_stats_t::max_req_fifo_cnt

The peak value of cur_req_fifo_cnt since the queue was created or the last clear_counters command.

uint32_t mica_queue_stats_t::cur_result_fifo_cnt[MAX_RESULT_FIFO_CNT]

The current number of entries in the result fifo(s).

uint32_t mica_queue_stats_t::max_result_fifo_cnt[MAX_RESULT_FIFO_CNT]

The peak value of cur_result_fifo_cnt since the queue was created or the last clear_counters command.

The documentation for this struct was generated from the following file:
  • gxio/mica_queue.h
